title: Ricardi wins three golds
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Local visually impaired...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Local visually impaired athlete Ricardi Matthee triumphed at the South African Sports Association for the Physically Disabled (SASAPD) National Championships in Bloemfontein.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Local visually impaired athlete Ricardi Matthee triumphed at the South African Sports Association for the Physically Disabled (SASAPD) National Championships in Bloemfontein."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He showed his talent and determination, securing a gold medal and defending his title in the 100m men's U20 category.","html":"He showed his talent and determination, securing a gold medal and defending his title in the 100m men's U20 category."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Ricardi also won the men's U20 long jump, with an impressive leap just shy of six metres.","html":"Ricardi also won the men's U20 long jump, with an impressive leap just shy of six metres."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The champs took place on the weekend of 22 March.","html":"The champs took place on the weekend of 22 March."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Day three","html":"Day three"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"To top it off, he claimed his third gold medal - in the 200m men's U20 race on day three of the championships.","html":"To top it off, he claimed his third gold medal - in the 200m men's U20 race on day three of the championships."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Ricardi and his family are raising funds so he can attend the World Para Athletics Grand Prix in Paris this June.","html":"Ricardi and his family are raising funds so he can attend the World Para Athletics Grand Prix in Paris this June."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Please consider contributing","html":"Please consider contributing"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"If you wish to help him achieve his dream, please consider contributing to this cause, his family asks.","html":"If you wish to help him achieve his dream, please consider contributing to this cause, his family asks."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The money raised will cover his accommodation, flight costs and entry fees for the Grand Prix.","html":"The money raised will cover his accommodation, flight costs and entry fees for the Grand Prix."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This is Ricardi's opportunity to achieve international qualification and secure a spot in the world rankings.","html":"This is Ricardi's opportunity to achieve international qualification and secure a spot in the world rankings."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"To make a contribution, visit the Back-a-Buddy page, \"Ricardi 2 Paris\".","html":"To make a contribution, visit the Back-a-Buddy page, \"Ricardi 2 Paris\"."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news.","html":"We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news."}]
